answers: Learn Python + SQL, Statistics, Visualization, ML. Tools: Jupyter, Pandas, NumPy.
Data Science roadmap: Python → SQL → Statistics → Data Visualisation → Machine Learning. Tools: Jupyter, Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, scikit-learn.
Start with Python and SQL, understand statistics basics, then learn to clean, analyse, and visualise data. Kaggle is perfect for practice.
Data Science = statistics + programming + domain knowledge. Start on Kaggle, work through real datasets, and build a portfolio of analysis projects.
